title: Custom Jukebox
description: This Datapack is used in the Alien-Packs Series by Mr3DAlien. It only functions when combined with other Datapacks and does not add any content on its own.
body:
[Mr3DAlien.net](http://mr3dalien.net 'http://mr3dalien.net') **|** [Discord](http://discord.mr3dalien.net 'http://discord.mr3dalien.net') **|** [Alien-Packs](https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks') **|** [Partners](https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners')
## Resource Pack Requirement

To fully utilize this datapack and ensure its proper functionality, it is mandatory to download and install the accompanying resource pack. The resource pack is an integral part of the gameplay and provides essential textures and audio assets required by the datapack.

Please download the [Required Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alien-packs) and install it before using the datapack. Without the resource pack, the datapack may not work as intended and you may miss out on crucial visual and audio elements.
# Custom Jukebox Datapack
## Expands those Datapacks:

- [Rick & Morty Portal Gun](https://modrinth.com/datapack/portalgun)

## Description

The Custom Jukebox Datapack is designed to complement specific Datapacks by adding extra Music Discs to enhance the gameplay experience. When installed alongside compatible Datapacks, it expands their features by introducing a wider selection of melodies that can be played using Jukeboxes.

It's important to note that this Datapack is not meant to be used independently and does not offer any standalone functionality. It is specifically created to work in conjunction with the designated Datapacks, providing optional additional music options for players who wish to have a more diverse and immersive auditory atmosphere.

To fully enjoy the expanded music selection, simply install the Custom Jukebox Datapack alongside the compatible Datapacks and let the melodies accompany your adventures in Minecraft.
